data.current_description: Retrieve scholix links
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve Scholix links that represent relationships between research products and related entities. Scholix is a standard for expressing links between scholarly literature and research data. Supports filtering via query parameters. Returns a collection of link objects containing source and target information, relationship types, and provenance metadata.
data.reasoning: The current description is repetitive and provides no context about what Scholix links are or what the response contains. Added domain context about Scholix standard, explanation of what links represent, and details about the response structure to improve AI agent understanding of this specialized endpoint.
